rag_rules: When repairing AGREE contracts, ensure function calls match the expected number of arguments and types.
Validate that all referenced identifiers in AGREE expressions are properly declared and typed.
Resolve type mismatches between left and right sides of binary expressions in AGREE contracts.
generic_rules: In AGREE contracts, function calls must provide the correct number of arguments as defined in their signatures.
All identifiers used in AGREE expressions must be declared with matching types to avoid resolution errors.
Binary expressions in AGREE must have operands of compatible types to prevent type mismatch diagnostics.
syntax_or_pattern_reminders: AGREE requires consistent type matching in expressions and function calls.
Function definitions in AGREE must be invoked with the correct number and types of arguments.
anti_patterns: Avoid introducing type mismatches in binary expressions by ensuring operand types align.
Do not call functions with incorrect argument counts; verify signatures before use.
irrelevant_topics: type scope range assumption and guarantee
